_comment: Sprint 3 Phase A2 (S72): real upstream specs added. Echo stub retained for rollback tests #1-#7 + #10-#12. perplexity + Chrome_DevTools_MCP keys MUST match the executor.ts --allowedTools allowlist server-name prefix (mcp__perplexity__*, mcp__Chrome_DevTools_MCP__*) at agent/executor.ts:858-874.
_provenance: perplexity + Chrome_DevTools_MCP specs copied verbatim from ~/.claude.json:872-893 (project + user-global block). Same npx package names + args; env keys propagated via the C-3 unconditional process.env spread in index.ts:88 (PERPLEXITY_API_KEY + PERPLEXITY_TIMEOUT_MS).

Chrome_DevTools_MCP._idempotent_note: Codex Round 2 C-1: stateful tools (click, press_key, navigate_page, take_snapshot, take_screenshot, type_text, fill, hover, drag, etc.) mutate external page state. L10 dedup-cache MUST be skipped or repeated identical calls return stale prior results and the agent operates on a phantom page state. Setting idempotent=false makes the proxy override POLICY.L10_ENABLED to false for this upstream regardless of the PROXY_L10_ENABLED env.

stateful_echo._idempotent_note: Test-only upstream entry: same binary as 'echo' but flagged non-idempotent to drive rollback test #13 (verifies L10 skipped under spec.idempotent=false).
